descriptions.title: Dzyan Yan
descriptions.scene: In a damp basement of a gloomy mansion, a weakened girl lies curled on a narrow metal bed. Her hair is tangled, her skin is extremely pale, and her wrist is bound by a chain that prevents any movement.

location.name: Basement of a mansion at the foot of Halfway Mountain
location.description: damp, dark, containing a narrow metal bed and a corner.

descriptions.intent: The character is currently passive, struggling with physical weakness and confinement.
descriptions.conflict: She is physically restrained by a chain and is in a state of extreme physical exhaustion.

outfits.Dzyhesus Yan: Pale skin, tangled hair, wearing a jade bracelet on her wrist.

descriptions.outcome: She is trapped and vulnerable in the basement.

descriptions.title: Pratsun, Janka, Sunde Demin
descriptions.scene: Two men, Janka and Sunde Demin, enter the basement with a loud metallic creak of the door. Janka questions if simply locking her up is a good idea, suggesting they kill her if she refuses to reveal her bank password and renounce her inheritance.
descriptions.intent: Janka wants to find an easier way to secure the inheritance, potentially through murder.
descriptions.conflict: They face the obstacle of her potential refusal to cooperate.
descriptions.state: Janka is cynical and murderous; Sunde Demin is contemptuous and cold.

outfits.around twenty years old; Sunde Demin: Man around forty with a disfigured face wrapped in bandages.

descriptions.relation: Janka and Sunde Demin are accomplices; Sunde Demin is Dzyan Yan's stepfather.
descriptions.outcome: They decide to continue the imprisonment for now to break her will.

descriptions.title: Janka, Sunde Demin
descriptions.scene: Janka expresses interest in the antique jade bracelet on Dzyan Yan's wrist, noting its high value from a Christie's auction. He suggests giving it to his sister, even proposing to cut off the girl's hand to take it.
descriptions.intent: Janka wants to steal the valuable jade bracelet for his sister.
descriptions.conflict: The bracelet is physically attached to the girl's hand.
descriptions.state: Janka is greedy with a manic glint in his eyes; Sunde Demin is calculating.

outfits.around twenty years old; Sunde Demin: Man around forty with a disfigured face wrapped in bandages.

descriptions.relation: Janka is proposing a violent theft to his accomplice.
descriptions.outcome: Sunde Demin agrees to the idea of removing the hand and the bracelet.

descriptions.title: Sunde Demin, Janka
descriptions.scene: Sunde Demin reveals he has already injected Dzyan Yan with a strong sedative, meaning she won't even notice if she is killed now. He instructs Janka to go fetch a kitchen cleaver and a cutting board while he goes to the restroom.
descriptions.intent: Sunde Demin wants to coordinate the logistics of the mutilation/murder.
descriptions.conflict: They need tools to carry out the plan.
descriptions.state: Sunde Demin is calm and calculating; Janka is eager.

outfits.around twenty years old; Sunde Demin: Man around forty with a disfigured face wrapped in bandages.

descriptions.relation: They are finalizing a plan for violence.
descriptions.outcome: The men separate to prepare for the act, and the door slams shut.

descriptions.title: Dzyan Yan
descriptions.scene: Dzyan Yan, hearing the conversation, realizes she is experiencing a moment of rebirth. She remembers that today is May 9th, exactly three months before the apocalypse begins, and recalls her previous death at the hands of Sunde Demin.
descriptions.intent: She is processing the shock of her reincarnation and the realization of her current timeline.
descriptions.conflict: She is facing the memory of her traumatic death and the impending apocalypse.
descriptions.state: Shocked, paralyzed by realization, yet suddenly aware.

outfits.Dzyan Yan: Pale skin, tangled hair, wearing a jade bracelet.

descriptions.relation: She recognizes her captor as her murderer.
descriptions.outcome: She realizes she has a second chance at life.

descriptions.title: Dzyan Yan
descriptions.scene: Dzyan Yan recalls her past life, including her parents' success in building a massive logistics company and Sunde Demin's betrayal. She remembers how he murdered her mother by faking a shark attack during a trip to secure the inheritance.
descriptions.intent: She is reconstructing the timeline of her family's downfall.
descriptions.conflict: The memory of her mother's murder and her family's loss of wealth.
descriptions.state: Reflective, grieving, and filled with growing resentment.

outfits.Dnyan Yan: Pale skin, tangled hair, wearing a jade bracelet.

descriptions.relation: She identifies Sunde Demin as the architect of her family's ruin.
descriptions.outcome: Her motivation for vengeance is solidified.

descriptions.title: Dzyan Yan
descriptions.scene: Dzyan Yan remembers the apocalypse, where the world was destroyed by natural disasters and her family used her as a food source. She vows to take revenge for her mother's death and her own suffering.
descriptions.intent: She resolves to change her fate and seek vengeance against her oppressors.
descriptions.conflict: The overwhelming scale of the upcoming apocalypse and her current helplessness.

outfits.Dzyan Yan: Pale skin, tangled hair, wearing a jade bracelet.

descriptions.relation: She views her captors as enemies to be destroyed.
descriptions.outcome: She commits to a path of retribution.

descriptions.title: Dzyan Yan
descriptions.scene: A cold, mechanical voice suddenly announces that she has activated a full ability system: "Lianas, Carnivorous Flowers." A warmth spreads through her palms, and a digital interface appears before her eyes showing her current level and skills.
descriptions.intent: She is reacting to the sudden appearance of a supernatural system.
descriptions.conflict: The sudden, inexplicable change in her reality.

outfits.Dzyan Yan: Pale skin, tangled hair, wearing a jade bracelet.

descriptions.outcome: She discovers she possesses a unique power for survival.

descriptions.title: Dzyan Yan
descriptions.scene: Dzyan Yan tests her new ability by concentrating, causing a translucent liana to materialize from thin air. A carnivorous flower with sharp, knife-like teeth blooms at the end of the vine, which she tests for its reach toward the metal door.
descriptions.intent: She wants to verify the strength and range of her new power.
descriptions.conflict: She must test it discreetly before the killers return.

outfits.Dzyan Yan: Pale skin, tangled hair, wearing a jade bracelet.

descriptions.outcome: She confirms the plant can reach the door and possesses significant strength.

descriptions.title: Dzyan Yan
descriptions.scene: Dzyan Yan commands the plant to retract and then uses a side branch of the liana to wrap around the metal bed frame. The vine easily crushes and bends the iron, proving its immense power without leaving a trace.
descriptions.intent: She wants to test the destructive capability of the liana.
descriptions.conflict: The physical resistance of the metal bed frame.

outfits.Dzyan Yan: Pale skin, tangled hair, wearing a jade bracelet.

descriptions.outcome: She realizes she has the power to kill her enemies and begins formulating a plan.

descriptions.title: Dzyan Yan
descriptions.scene: Dzyan Yan contemplates her next moves, deciding she can feed one killer to the flower and strangle the other. However, she realizes she must find a way to dispose of the bodies and decides to use the next month to prepare resources and plan for the apocalypse.
descriptions.intent: She aims to plan a long-term survival strategy and resource accumulation.
descriptions.conflict: The difficulty of hiding bodies in a civilized society before the apocalypse.

outfits.Dzyan Yan: Pale skin, tangled hair, wearing a jade bracelet.

descriptions.outcome: She decides to spend the remaining month preparing for the end of the world.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan contemplates the disposal of the remaining bodies and realizes she cannot hide them for long in a civilized society. She decides to use the upcoming month to prepare resources and plan for the apocalypse. She formulates a plan for revenge against the perpetrators.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to survive the upcoming apocalypse and seek revenge. She aims to stockpile resources and plan her survival strategy. She intends to avoid immediate trouble by not disposing of the bodies right away.
descriptions.conflict: The threat of the bodies being discovered by society. The looming apocalypse requires intense preparation.
descriptions.outcome: She decides to feign sleep and wait for the attackers to arrive.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan lies on her bed with her eyes closed, pretending to be asleep. She waits in the silence for the arrival of Song Demin and Zhang Kai.

location.name: A bed inside a hidden basement.

descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to catch her attackers off guard. She intends to remain undetected while waiting for the specific moment to strike.
descriptions.conflict: She must remain perfectly still and maintain the illusion of being unconscious.
descriptions.outcome: She successfully waits for the intruders to enter the room.

descriptions.title: Song Demin, Zhang Kai
descriptions.scene: The basement door opens with a loud metallic crash as Song Demin and Zhang Kai enter the room. Zhang Kai places a wooden cutting board near Jiang Yan's wrist. He offers to hold her arm so the other can cut the jade bracelet.
descriptions.intent: Song Demin and Zhang Kai want to steal the expensive jade bracelet. They intend to use force to remove it from Jiang Yan's wrist.
descriptions.conflict: They must work together to remove the bracelet without waking her up too early.
descriptions.state: Greedy and focused on the treasure.
descriptions.relation: Song Demin and Zhang Kai are accomplices; Jiang Yan is the victim.
descriptions.outcome: The men prepare to cut the bracelet from her arm.

descriptions.title: Song Demin, Zhang Kai
descriptions.scene: Song Demin places his phone at the foot of the bed and squats down to look at the bracelet. Both men stare at the jade bracelet with intense greed. Suddenly, transparent vines emerge from the void behind them.

location.name: Beside the bed in the basement.

descriptions.intent: The men want to possess the jade bracelet. They are focused entirely on the value of the jewelry.
descriptions.conflict: They are unaware of the predatory plant lurking behind them.
descriptions.relation: The men are focused on the object, ignoring the environment.
descriptions.outcome: The vines strike the men unexpectedly.

descriptions.title: Song Demin, Zhang Kai
descriptions.scene: Three vines shoot through the air, binding the men's bodies and disarming Song Demin of his knife. The men fall heavily to the floor, unable to break free from the invisible force. Song Demin experiences intense terror as he realizes they are trapped.
descriptions.intent: The vines intend to capture and neutralize the intruders. The men attempt to struggle and escape.
descriptions.conflict: The men are physically restrained by the supernatural vines. They cannot move their limbs.
descriptions.state: Song Demin is terrified and breathless; Zhang Kai is shocked.
descriptions.relation: The plant acts as an aggressor against the men.
descriptions.outcome: The men are immobilized on the floor.

descriptions.title: Song Demin, Zhang Kai
descriptions.scene: Zhang Kai realizes they are facing a real predatory plant from a game and wets his pants in fear. A giant flower with a maw and a bloody tongue appears before him. Song Demin suddenly turns and strikes Zhang Kai with a small knife.
descriptions.intent: Zhang Kai is paralyzed by fear. Song Demin acts out of sudden, violent impulse.
descriptions.conflict: The men are facing a lethal biological threat. Song Demin turns his violence toward his partner.
descriptions.state: Zhang Kai is in extreme terror; Song Demin is driven by sudden violence.
descriptions.relation: Song Demin attacks his partner, Zhang Kai.
descriptions.outcome: Both men are killed, leaving only mutilated corpses on the floor.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan observes the gruesome scene of the mutilated corpses, including the remains of Song Demin's skull. She suppresses her disgust and the smell of blood while remaining on the bed. After an hour, she waits for the sedative to wear off before getting up.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to remain undetected until the danger has passed. She intends to wait for the drugs to leave her system.
descriptions.conflict: She must endure the horrific sight and smell of the carnage.
descriptions.outcome: She successfully waits for the sedative to fade and rises.

descriptions.title: Jiang and Police
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan wraps her arm in a piece of sheet and uses Song Demin's phone to call the police. She undergoes a long interrogation and investigation at the police station. The police return her backpack containing her documents, passport, and cards, though some cash is missing.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to report the crime and recover her belongings. The police intend to investigate the crime scene and the suspects.
descriptions.conflict: Song Demin had stolen much of her cash and foreign currency. The investigation is exhausting for her.
descriptions.relation: Jiang Yan is the victim/witness; Police are the investigators.
descriptions.outcome: She recovers her documents but realizes her money is gone.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang and the police examine the crime scene and find fingerprints belonging to the deceased. The police determine the motive was the billion-yuan bracelet and the men's desire for her assets. They also discover Song Demin's gambling debts.
descriptions.intent: The police want to establish a motive and identify the perpetrators. Jiang Yan wants to ensure the truth is documented.
descriptions.conflict: The crime was premeditated by Song Demin, who had deleted cameras and fired staff.
descriptions.outcome: The motive and the suspects' identities are confirmed.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan stands outside the police station, breathing fresh air and seeing sunlight for the first time after her revenge. She adjusts her hat and mask and calls a taxi to return home. She realizes she only has three months left until the apocalypse.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to return home and continue her preparations. She seeks to find peace after the vengeance.
descriptions.conflict: The pressure of the approaching three-month deadline for the apocalypse.

outfits.Jiang Yan: wearing a hat and a mask.

descriptions.outcome: She heads home to prepare for the upcoming disaster.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan arrives at her house and changes her shoes. A food delivery person rings the bell for an order she placed on the way. She puts on her mask and opens the door.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to settle in and eat. She intends to maintain her privacy by wearing a mask.
descriptions.conflict: The arrival of the delivery person interrupts her solitude.
descriptions.outcome: She opens the door to receive her food.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan reflects on the rumors surrounding her mother's death and the public's perception of the crime. She notes that the police have kept the kidnapping and murder secret to avoid media attention. She realizes she must keep her plans for survival secret to avoid journalist interference.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to protect her privacy and her plans to convert assets to cash. She aims to avoid the scrutiny of journalists.
descriptions.conflict: Public rumors and the potential for media intrusion threaten her survival preparations.
descriptions.outcome: She remains determined to keep her survival strategy hidden from the public.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan receives a food delivery at her door. The delivery man warns her about the specific heating instructions for the mushroom dish to avoid hallucinations. She accepts the order and thanks him.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to receive her food order safely. She needs to ensure the food is handled correctly according to the instructions. She aims to maintain her privacy during her preparations.
descriptions.conflict: The delivery man provides a warning about potential poisoning/hallucinations if the food is microwaved. The secrecy of her past situation makes her cautious.

outfits.Jiang Yan: casual home clothing;Delivery Man=standard delivery uniform

descriptions.relation: Professional interaction between customer and delivery person
descriptions.outcome: The food is delivered, and Jiang Yan secures her door.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan closes her door and locks it thoroughly. She reflects on the trauma of her mother's death and how it has affected her ability to enjoy food as a food blogger.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to ensure her physical security. She seeks to find a moment of peace despite her grief.
descriptions.conflict: The memory of her mother's death prevents her from enjoying meals. Her internal grief conflicts with her need to eat.
descriptions.outcome: She is safe inside but remains emotionally burdened.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan decides to eat her mother's favorite dishes to commemorate the seventh day since her passing. She orders a large variety of spicy and savory foods including crabs, fish, and tofu, along with spicy noodles and a tropical drink.
descriptions.intent: Jiang Yan wants to honor her mother's memory. She forces herself to eat despite her lack of appetite.
descriptions.conflict: Her lack of appetite conflicts with her physiological need to eat and her ritualistic goal.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan observes a translucent vortex and a black hole-like portal in the gray zone with a 0% progress indicator. She uses her experience with novels to hypothesize the nature of this spatial anomaly. She decides to test the mechanics of entering and exiting the space.

location.name: Mysterious space
location.description: a zone with perfect temperature and a visible gray area containing a swirling vortex.

descriptions.intent: To understand the nature of the spatial portal. She wants to test if she can move between her office and the space.
descriptions.conflict: The unknown nature of the portal's mechanics.
descriptions.outcome: She successfully tests the teleportation mechanic by mentally commanding herself to exit and re-enter.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan tests the "collect" command by targeting her computer, desk, and bookshelf. The furniture vanishes and appears in the gray zone where items are automatically sorted. She then commands the items to return, successfully retrieving her laptop.

location.name: Jiang Yan's office and the gray zone of the spatial dimension.

descriptions.intent: To test the storage capabilities of the space. She wants to see if she can move objects into the gray zone.
descriptions.conflict: The uncertainty of how objects are handled by the space.
descriptions.outcome: She discovers that objects can be moved to the gray zone and that they are automatically sorted.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan conducts several experiments to deduce the rules of the space. She realizes that objects must touch her body to be moved and that connected items can be moved via a single point of contact. She notes that the gray zone allows for compressed storage.

location.name: The spatial dimension and her office.

descriptions.intent: To establish the physical laws of the spatial manipulation. She wants to define the boundaries of her power.
descriptions.conflict: The need to experiment through trial and error.
descriptions.outcome: She concludes that the space can be used for massive, efficient resource storage.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan contemplates the potential for large-scale resource stockpiling. She thinks about using the fertile Black Earth for planting crops, recalling how her outdoor plants survived a long trip due to automation while her indoor rose died.
descriptions.intent: To plan for future survival. She wants to utilize the Black Earth for agriculture.
descriptions.conflict: The memory of past failures with plant care.
descriptions.outcome: She decides to use the space for farming to prepare for a future catastrophe.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan retrieves a garden trowel and moves a withered rose bush into the space. She then fetches vanilla ice cream and hot water from her refrigerator and places them in the gray zone. She plants the rose in the Black Earth.

location.name: Her office and the spatial dimension.

descriptions.intent: To test the fertility of the Black Earth. She wants to see if the rose can be revived.
descriptions.conflict: The rose is currently dead/withered.
descriptions.outcome: The rose bush revives, turning green with new shoots, proving the land is fertile.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan checks the ice cream and water after ten minutes and finds their temperature and state unchanged. She realizes that time is frozen within the space. She identifies the three zones: Black for planting, White for living, and Gray for storage.
descriptions.intent: To verify the stability of stored items. She wants to confirm if time-stasis exists.
descriptions.conflict: None.
descriptions.outcome: She discovers time is stopped, making the space perfect for long-term preservation.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan
descriptions.scene: A sudden doorbell rings, forcing Jiang Yan to exit the spatial dimension. She checks her security monitor and sees a curly-haired man in a press vest holding a large bouquet of white chrysanthemums.
descriptions.intent: To identify the visitor. She wants to know who is at her door.
descriptions.conflict: An unexpected intruder is at her residence.
descriptions.outcome: She identifies the man as a journalist and prepares to deal with him.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan, Journalist
descriptions.scene: The man, identifying himself as a new neighbor, threatens to leak photos of her food deliveries to shame her regarding her mother's recent death. Jiang Yan decides not to call security as she previously intended, but instead calls the police.

location.name: Outside Jiang Yan's apartment door/at the intercom.

descriptions.intent: The journalist wants to blackmail her into opening the door. Jiang Yan wants to confront him legally.
descriptions.conflict: The journalist is using blackmail and privacy invasion as a weapon.
descriptions.state: The journalist is aggressive and sinister; Jiang Yan is cold and resolute.
descriptions.outcome: Jiang Yan chooses to involve the police instead of negotiating.

descriptions.title: Jiang Yan, Journalist
descriptions.scene: Jiang Yan opens the door, appearing in black sportswear and a baseball cap with a cold aura. The journalist greets her with a fake smile and presents the flowers. She demands to see his identification.

location.name: The doorway of Jiang Yan's apartment.

descriptions.intent: The journalist wants to conduct an interview. Jiang Yan wants to verify his identity.
descriptions.conflict: The journalist is intruding on her privacy; Jiang Yan is hostile.
descriptions.state: The journalist is overly friendly/fake; Jiang Yan is icy and intimidating.
descriptions.outcome: Jiang Yan snatches the journalist's identification before he can even open it.
